The '''Type 1 Navigation Buoy''' was a [[hyperspace navigation buoy]]. Its [[Hologram/Legends|holographic]] projection generated by a [[Starship/Legends|starship's]] flight computer provided a visual reference marker for the [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]. They were often used to locate hyperpoints within a [[Sector/Legends|sector]] of space.

{{Tech-stub}}
